hero.title: Hi, I'm Zula.
hero.subtitle: I build production-ready apps with Angular, .NET and Electron. Clean architecture, clear interfaces and software that simply works.

whatIDo.title: What I do
whatIDo.lead: I build real-world software with Angular, .NET and Electron, focusing on clarity, clean architecture and reliable integrations.

items.title: Web Apps (Angular)
items.desc: Modular components, advanced forms, state patterns, i18n, clean and accessible UI. Hands-on with panels, datatables, dashboards and enterprise interfaces.

items.title: APIs & Backends with .NET / C#
items.desc: REST APIs with solid validation, Entity Framework, basic security, layered architecture and separated services. Integration with real SQL databases.

items.title: Desktop Apps (Electron)
items.desc: Angular + Electron, OS integration, media control, drag & drop, local persistence and production-ready deliveries.

items.title: Integrations & External Services
items.desc: MQTT with devices (cameras, barriers, sensors), Redsys (3DES signing), Google APIs, SendGrid and third-party APIs in real environments.

items.title: Databases & Queries
items.desc: SQL Server, PL/SQL, data models, migrations, optimized queries and data management for web and desktop.

items.title: DevOps & Workflow
items.desc: Docker, test environments, version control, basic CI/CD, clean branches, clear PRs and collaborative best practices.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.lead: Real solutions focused on use cases, not just technologies.

cards.title: KeyPing
cards.desc: Password manager with pattern analysis and secure sync.

cards.title: Saica Conductores
cards.desc: Enterprise panel for workforce management and compliance.

cards.title: MQTT device app
cards.desc: Control and monitoring of barriers and cameras with real integrations.

cards.title: Dual Media Player
cards.desc: Dual-track control, effects and intuitive drag & drop.

cards.title: Additional project
cards.desc: Space to add more projects and experiments.

items.title: Approach
items.desc: Understand the problem, clear architecture and fast iteration.

items.title: Code
items.desc: Maintainability, well-defined layers and consistent standards.

items.title: Collaboration
items.desc: Teamwork, code reviews and precise documentation.

items.title: Delivery
items.desc: Quick prototypes, short cycles and feedback-driven improvements.

aboutMini.title: About me
aboutMini.desc: I’m Unax, a software developer from Bilbao. I work with Angular, .NET and Electron building production software and personal apps focused on utility and clarity. I like solving problems with clean architecture and delivering intuitive interfaces.
aboutMini.collabTitle: Want to collaborate on a project or hire me?
